violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Foods in Prep cooler and reach-in found with out dates.
General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --- Leather strap on reach-in freezer is not designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --- Dishwasher needs to be cleaned.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Rugs found in Kitchen on cook lines.
